requiredBeforeAnyPatchRow: fresh clean-specimen byte export still matches 0x00513167 / 0x113167
copied-executable A/B byte verification under app-owned proof root
restore verification before and after any attempted alternate immediate
physical gamepad or equivalent DirectInput runtime device present on the host
exact managed copied BEA PID and CDB attachment
DirectInput poll/accessor rows at 0x00513370 PlatformInput__PollPadState and CPCController joy accessors
zero keyboard SendInput/keybd_event/PostMessage positive-stimulus counters for the DirectInput stimulus window

proofPlan.description: Run copied clean baseline with the current 0x96 immediate, physical DirectInput/gamepad input, no keyboard stimulus, CDB rows, downstream state rows, and a no-input negative control.
Run a copied executable with one byte-verified alternate immediate only after restore and source-safety checks pass; compare DirectInput/accessor/state evidence against baseline.
Restore copied executable bytes and verify the 0x96 instruction bytes before any further run or user-facing row consideration.

nonClaims: not proof that 0x96 causes floaty controls
not proof that lowering the immediate improves controls
claimBoundary: This contract makes the next DirectInput deadzone A/B proof gate explicit. It records the current workstation as blocked by no present gamepad candidate and keeps all patch-row, runtime, physical-gamepad, improved-feel, online, rebuild, and no-noticeable-difference claims false.
